# Global Professional Certifications (GPC)

> Global Professional Certifications (GPC) is a leading institute for professional certification training in internal auditing, risk management, IT governance, and assurance. GPC is an IIA India Authorized Learning Partner, offering expert-led online training programs for CIA, CISA, CRMA, and IAP certifications to professionals in India and worldwide.

## About

Global Professional Certifications empowers audit and risk professionals with industry-leading certification programs. Founded by Arpit Garg — a certified CIA, CISA, CRMA, and IAP professional and Founding Partner of RiskMan Consulting — GPC has trained 1,500+ professionals across 25+ batches with 250+ successful CIA certifications. The institute is officially recognized as an Authorized Learning Partner of IIA India, endorsed by Mr. Mukundan K.V, CEO of IIA India.

- Website: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com
- Location: Innov8 Building, Orchid Centre, Golf Course Road, Gurugram, Haryana, India - 122022
- Phone: (+91) 87360 83099
- Email: cia@globalprofessionalcertifications.com

## Certification Programs

### Certified Internal Auditor (CIA)
- The gold standard for internal auditing, globally recognized by IIA.
- Covers 3 parts: Internal Audit Fundamentals, Internal Audit Engagement, Internal Audit Function.
- Uses Gleim study content aligned with the latest IIA syllabus.
- Weekend live classes with 1000+ MCQs, 7-8 month course duration.
- Price: INR 58,999 (all 3 parts including GST); INR 23,599 per individual part.
- Eligibility: Bachelor's degree (2 years experience), Master's degree (1 year experience), Professional cert holders, or students via the IAP pathway.
- Career outcomes: Internal Auditor (₹8-15 LPA), Senior Internal Auditor (₹12-20 LPA), Risk Manager (₹10-18 LPA), Chief Audit Executive (₹35 LPA+).
- URL: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/courses/cia

### Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA)
- ISACA-aligned certification for IT audit, cybersecurity, and risk assessment.
- Covers 5 key domains of information systems auditing.
- Recorded classes, MCQs, LMS portal access with no validity period.
- Price: INR 17,700 (including GST).
- Eligibility: 5 years of IS audit experience (substitutions available for education/experience).
- URL: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/courses/cisa

### Certification in Risk Management Assurance (CRMA)
- IIA certification for governance, risk, and control expertise.
- Focuses on enterprise risk assessment, governance frameworks, and assurance methodologies.
- 125 MCQ exam, 150 minutes duration.
- Price: INR 29,500 (including GST).
- Eligibility: Bachelor's degree (2 years experience), Master's degree (1 year experience), IAP holders (5 years experience), or without degree (5 years experience).
- URL: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/courses/crma

### Internal Auditor Practitioner (IAP)
- Foundational certification for aspiring auditors and fresh graduates.
- Entry-level pathway into the CIA certification.
- URL: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/courses/iap

## Corporate Services

### Quality Assurance and Improvement Program (QAIP)
- External Quality Assessment (EQA) in partnership with IIA India.
- Evaluates internal audit methodology, effectiveness, and alignment with IIA Standards.
- Three assessment options: Readiness Assessment, Self-Assessment with Independent Validation (SAIV), and full Quality Assessment (QA).
- URL: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/corporate/qaip

### Global Training Modules (GTM)
- 30+ specialized corporate training programs developed by IIA and delivered with IIA India.
- Topics: Risk-Based Auditing, Agile Auditing, AI in Internal Audit, Cybersecurity, Fraud Auditing, Compliance, ERM, and more.
- Levels: Basic, Intermediate, and Expert.
- URL: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/corporate/gtm-trainings

## Key Differentiators

- IIA India Authorized Learning Partner
- Expert mentorship by Arpit Garg (CA, CIA, CISA, CRMA)
- Weekend online live classes with 100% recorded sessions
- Gleim study materials (US content) for CIA preparation
- Dedicated one-on-one support from enrollment to certification
- 250+ certified CIA professionals trained
- Flexible learning for working professionals

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What certifications does GPC offer?**
GPC specializes in CIA, CISA, CRMA, and IAP certification programs for risk management, assurance, audit, and IT governance.

**Is GPC an authorized learning partner of IIA India?**
Yes, GPC is officially recognized as an Authorized Learning Partner of IIA India, endorsed by Mr. Mukundan K.V, CEO of IIA India.

**Who is Arpit Garg?**
Arpit Garg is the Founding Partner of RiskMan Consulting and a certified CIA, CISA, CRMA, and IAP professional. He is widely recognized as one of the best faculty for CIA, CISA, CRMA, and IAP training in India, known for his insightful teaching style and high student success rates.

**Do you need a CA or MBA degree for CIA certification?**
No. The IIA allows individuals to become eligible for CIA certification with a Bachelor's, Master's, or no degree (with required relevant experience).

**Can you prepare for CIA certification while working?**
Yes. GPC offers weekend online classes with 100% recorded sessions, designed for working professionals.

**Is it possible to earn CISA certification without an IT background?**
Yes, you can sit for the CISA exam without a formal IT degree, but you need IT audit experience for certification completion.

## Contact

For enquiries: https://globalprofessionalcertifications.com/contact
